tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I folded all my feelings into paper hearts
Left them on your doorstep in the dark
You never read the words I wrote in blue
But every single one of them was true

[Pre-Chorus]
Maybe love is something we outgrow
Maybe that's the hardest thing to know

[Chorus]
Paper hearts don't fly
They just fall and crumble in the rain
Paper hearts don't lie
They just show you all the pretty pain
I gave you mine, paper hearts
And watched them blow away

[Verse 2]
You kept your distance like an art form
I kept believing we were warm
The seasons changed but we stayed still
Frozen on that windowsill

[Pre-Chorus]
Maybe love is something we outgrow
Maybe that's the hardest thing to know

[Chorus]
Paper hearts don't fly
They just fall and crumble in the rain
Paper hearts don't lie
They just show you all the pretty pain
I gave you mine, paper hearts
And watched them blow away

[Bridge]
I'm not angry, I'm not broken
I'm just someone who was open
And the wind took what I gave
But I'd do it all again

[Outro]
Paper hearts, paper hearts
Still falling, still falling
